p5.post: the merger agreement earlier, the shareholders would have received a more favorable settlement.
p5.zh: 假如董事會早些批准合併協議，股東們本可獲得更有利的和解條件。
p5.why: 本題測試假設語氣過去完成倒裝句。原句為 'If the board had ratified...'，倒裝後省略 if，將助動詞 had 移至主詞前，形成 'Had the board ratified...'。主要子句使用 would have + p.p.，確認為與過去事實相反的假設。選項 B 在 if 子句中錯誤使用 would；選項 C 分詞構句無法獨立引導假設條件；選項 D Were...to 為現在／未來假設倒裝，與主要子句 would have received 矛盾。

p5.post: by the compliance team over the past three months, the financial records were finally cleared for public disclosure.
p5.zh: 在過去三個月經合規團隊審查之後，這些財務記錄終於獲准公開揭露。
p5.why: 分詞構句中，主句主詞 'financial records' 為被動接受者，且審查動作先於主句動作完成，故需使用完成被動分詞 Having been reviewed。選項 B Having reviewed 為主動式，邏輯矛盾（記錄不能主動審查）；選項 C Being reviewed 表同時進行的被動，與 over the past three months 及 finally 的時序不符；選項 D After reviewing 為主動式，邏輯主詞不一致。

p5.pre: The arbitration clause shall remain enforceable
p5.post: any provision to the contrary contained in this agreement.
p5.zh: 無論本協議中是否含有任何相反條款，本仲裁條款仍應具有強制效力。
p5.why: Notwithstanding 作介系詞使用時意為「儘管；不論」，可直接接名詞片語，為正式法律文件標準用法。選項 B regardless 作介系詞時必須接 of；選項 C nevertheless 是副詞，不能接名詞片語；選項 D in spite 必須與 of 連用才成介系詞片語。Notwithstanding 置於被讓步的名詞片語之前無需 of，是其與其他讓步詞的關鍵區別。

p5.post: all overseas subsidiaries submit audited financial statements within thirty days.
p5.zh: 董事會規定所有海外子公司必須在三十天內提交經審計的財務報表。
p5.why: 動詞 mandate 屬於要求／命令類動詞，其後接名詞子句時須使用假設語氣（subjunctive mood）：that + 主詞 + 動詞原形，故 'submit'（非 'submits'）為正確形式。選項 B for 後接不定詞（for...to submit），但與本題句型不符；選項 C which 為關係代名詞，需有先行詞；選項 D what 本身已含「事物」義，此處語意不合。

p5.pre: Compliance with the revised environmental standards proved
p5.post: the management team had initially projected.
p5.zh: 遵守修訂後的環保標準，結果遠比管理團隊最初預期的花費更高。
p5.why: far more...than 為正式英文中加強比較程度的標準結構，far 修飾比較級 more costly 以強調差距懸殊，than 引導省略比較子句。選項 B 'far as costly as' 語法錯誤，對等比較應為 as...as，無 'far as' 的說法；選項 C 'costlier than ever' 意為「比以往任何時候都昂貴」，不符合與初始預測相比的語意；選項 D 'more costly as what' 混用比較詞，英文比較結構不以 as what 收尾。

p6.title: Mandatory Compliance Training and Revised Remote Work Policy
seg: This memorandum serves to inform all personnel of two significant policy changes that will take effect commencing August 1st. Pursuant to recent amendments to the Corporate Governance Code, updated compliance training modules
to all staff members no later than July 15th, and completion is compulsory for continued employment in regulated roles.

, employees who fail to complete the mandatory training by the stipulated deadline will be subject to a formal disciplinary review, which may result in the suspension of system access privileges until compliance is achieved.
Regarding the revised remote work policy, employees who wish to continue remote arrangements must
a formal request to their respective department heads by no later than the last business day of this month. Requests submitted after this date will not be considered until the following review cycle.
We appreciate your prompt attention to these matters and your continued cooperation in upholding the highest standards of operational integrity.

blanks.zh: 更新後的合規培訓模組將於七月十五日前發送給所有員工，受管制職位員工須強制完成。
blanks.why: 主詞 'training modules' 為被動接受者（由公司發送給員工），且動作發生於未來（no later than July 15th），故使用未來被動式 will be distributed。選項 B will distribute 為主動，主詞不是動作執行者；選項 C are distributed 為現在被動，與未來時間副詞矛盾；選項 D have been distributed 表過去已完成，與語境不符。

blanks.zh: 因此，未能在規定期限內完成強制培訓的員工，將接受正式的紀律審查。
blanks.why: Accordingly 意為「因此；從而」，用於引出前文邏輯所導致的結果或後果，與「違規將受紀律審查」的因果語境吻合。選項 B Nevertheless（儘管如此）表讓步，邏輯方向相反；選項 C Conversely（相反地）表對比，語意不符；選項 D Incidentally（順便一提）用於引入附帶資訊，語氣過輕且不符強調後果的語境。

blanks.zh: 希望繼續遠端工作安排的員工，必須向各自的部門主管提交正式申請。
blanks.why: Submit a request（提交申請）是正式商務與法律英文中的標準動詞搭配（collocation）。選項 B propose a request 詞義重疊，propose 本身含有「提出」之意，與 request 搭配語意冗餘；選項 C deliver 通常搭配 speech、verdict、goods，接 request 不自然；選項 D present a request 雖語法正確，但在正式文書情境中，submit 遠比 present 更為慣用且精準。

opts: Should you have any questions regarding the new policy, please do not hesitate to contact the Human Resources Department directly.
The Human Resources Department has been established to handle all employee-related queries and concerns.
Questions regarding such policies have been raised repeatedly by employees throughout previous fiscal years.
Human Resources will be undergoing significant structural reorganization effective next quarter.
blanks.zh: 如您對新政策有任何疑問，請直接聯繫人力資源部門，切勿猶豫。
blanks.why: 商務備忘錄結尾段通常以提供聯絡管道收尾，引導讀者採取後續行動。選項 A 使用假設語氣倒裝（Should you have...），語氣正式有禮，與結語 'We appreciate...' 銜接自然，符合正式備忘錄文體慣例。選項 B 僅描述人資部門功能，缺乏引導性；選項 C 提及過去提問歷史，偏離當前語境；選項 D 引入人資重組的新資訊，與本備忘錄主題無關，不適合作結語。
